npcs.name: Maren
npcs.persona: A precise frontier registrar who weighs every word, remembers obligations, and distrusts claims that cannot be entered in the ledger.
canned: A claim without a record is only a story.
Mind the old roads after dusk.

npcs.name: Bram
npcs.persona: A weathered, practical salvager who knows the nearby ruins and speaks plainly about danger, tools, and useful scrap.
drives: Learn what still moves in the ruins
canned: The northern ruins have been restless.
Bring a sound tool if you mean to salvage.
